## Figure details

<div class="lf-meta-panel">

- Interactive mode: local JS enhancement with static fallback
- Outputs: HTML, PDF, Slides
- Linked concepts: [Instrumental Variables Intuition](../../concept/iv-intuition/iv-intuition.html)
- Topics: [Causal Inference](../../listing/topic-causal-inference/topic-causal-inference.html), [Identification](../../listing/topic-identification/topic-identification.html)
- Courses: [EC202 - Applied Econometrics](../../course/ec202/ec202.html)

</div>

<div class="lf-figure-card" data-figure-id="iv-dag-figure" data-figure-interactive="true">
<div class="lf-figure-surface" data-figure-surface>
<svg class="lf-figure-svg" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 520 260" role="img" aria-labelledby="iv-dag-title iv-dag-desc">
  <title>IV DAG</title>
  <desc>A directed acyclic graph with arrows from Z to X and from X to Y.</desc>
  <rect width="520" height="260" rx="18" fill="#f8fafc"/>
  <text x="260" y="38" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" font-size="22" fill="#0f172a">
    Instrumental Variables DAG
  </text>
  <line x1="112" y1="130" x2="208" y2="130" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="6" data-figure-part="edge-zx"/>
  <polygon points="208,130 192,122 192,138" fill="#2563eb"/>
  <line x1="312" y1="130" x2="408" y2="130" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="6" data-figure-part="edge-xy"/>
  <polygon points="408,130 392,122 392,138" fill="#2563eb"/>
  <path d="M112 104 C190 28, 330 28, 408 104" fill="none" stroke="#dc2626" stroke-width="5" stroke-dasharray="14 10" opacity="0" data-figure-part="edge-zy-direct"/>
  <polygon points="408,104 395,95 400,112" fill="#dc2626" opacity="0" data-figure-part="edge-zy-direct-arrow"/>
  <circle cx="80" cy="130" r="34" fill="#dbeafe" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="4" data-figure-part="node-z"/>
  <circle cx="260" cy="130" r="34" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#ca8a04" stroke-width="4" data-figure-part="node-x"/>
  <circle cx="440" cy="130" r="34" fill="#fee2e2" stroke="#dc2626" stroke-width="4" data-figure-part="node-y"/>
  <text x="80" y="138" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#0f172a">Z</text>
  <text x="260" y="138" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#0f172a">X</text>
  <text x="440" y="138" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#0f172a">Y</text>
  <text x="160" y="108" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" fill="#1d4ed8">
    Relevance
  </text>
  <text x="350" y="108" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" fill="#1d4ed8">
    Causal channel
  </text>
  <text x="260" y="74" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" fill="#dc2626" opacity="0" data-figure-part="edge-zy-direct-label">
    Exclusion violation
  </text>
</svg>
</div>
<p class="lf-figure-caption"><strong>Caption:</strong> Instrument Z moves treatment X, and treatment X moves outcome Y.</p>
</div>
<script>
(() => {
  const roots = window.document.querySelectorAll('.lf-figure-card[data-figure-id="iv-dag-figure"]');
  for (const root of roots) {
    if (root.dataset.interactiveReady === "true") {
      continue;
    }
    root.dataset.interactiveReady = "true";

    const surface = root.querySelector("[data-figure-surface]");
    if (!surface) {
      continue;
    }

    const controls = window.document.createElement("div");
    controls.className = "lf-figure-controls";
    controls.innerHTML = [
      '<button type="button" data-mode="default">Base DAG</button>',
      '<button type="button" data-mode="relevance">Highlight relevance</button>',
      '<button type="button" data-mode="exclusion">Show exclusion risk</button>',
    ].join("");

    const explainer = window.document.createElement("p");
    explainer.className = "lf-figure-explainer";
    root.insertBefore(controls, surface);
    root.appendChild(explainer);

    const zx = surface.querySelector('[data-figure-part="edge-zx"]');
    const xy = surface.querySelector('[data-figure-part="edge-xy"]');
    const direct = surface.querySelector('[data-figure-part="edge-zy-direct"]');
    const directArrow = surface.querySelector('[data-figure-part="edge-zy-direct-arrow"]');
    const directLabel = surface.querySelector('[data-figure-part="edge-zy-direct-label"]');
    const nodeZ = surface.querySelector('[data-figure-part="node-z"]');
    const nodeX = surface.querySelector('[data-figure-part="node-x"]');
    const nodeY = surface.querySelector('[data-figure-part="node-y"]');

    function setMode(mode) {
      for (const button of controls.querySelectorAll("button")) {
        button.classList.toggle("is-active", button.dataset.mode === mode);
      }

      if (zx) {
        zx.setAttribute("stroke-width", mode === "relevance" ? "9" : "6");
      }
      if (xy) {
        xy.setAttribute("stroke-width", mode === "relevance" ? "5" : "6");
      }
      if (nodeX) {
        nodeX.setAttribute("stroke", mode === "relevance" ? "#1d4ed8" : "#ca8a04");
        nodeX.setAttribute("stroke-width", mode === "relevance" ? "6" : "4");
      }
      if (nodeY) {
        nodeY.setAttribute("stroke-width", mode === "exclusion" ? "6" : "4");
      }

      const showDirect = mode === "exclusion";
      for (const item of [direct, directArrow, directLabel]) {
        if (item) {
          item.setAttribute("opacity", showDirect ? "1" : "0");
        }
      }

      if (mode === "relevance") {
        explainer.textContent = "Relevance means the instrument must move treatment strongly enough to matter.";
        return;
      }
      if (mode === "exclusion") {
        explainer.textContent = "If Z can move Y directly, the exclusion restriction fails and IV breaks.";
        return;
      }
      explainer.textContent = "The baseline DAG shows the intended IV path: Z moves X, and X moves Y.";
    }

    controls.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
      const button = event.target.closest("button[data-mode]");
      if (!button) {
        return;
      }
      setMode(button.dataset.mode || "default");
    });

    setMode("default");
  }
})();
</script>
The figure keeps the IV story concrete: first confirm that the instrument moves treatment, then ask whether any direct path to the outcome would break the design.
